'''Omon Gantum''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] who ran the [[Spaceport Express/Legends|Spaceport Express]] service at [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. After starting to [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggle]] illegal goods delivered by [[Norun Gep]] and [[Fillin Ta]], business had turned to be very good for Omon. He was even able to deliver a list of the contraband to [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Valarian/Legends|Valarian]].<ref name="GG7" />

{{Char-stub}}
